name: matt-partok-bundled-plugin-for-knowledge-work
description: A Codex-native adaptation of Matt Pocock's complete promoted workflow, extended for coding and general knowledge work.

interface.displayName: Matt Partok Bundled Plugin For Knowledge Work
interface.shortDescription: Matt Pocock's full workflow, adapted for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Clarify ideas, record shared language, research unknowns, prototype questions, write specs, split work, execute bounded slices, hand off across threads, and review against evidence. Includes coding and knowledge-work tracks.
defaultPrompt: Ask Matt which workflow fits this task.
Grill me, then turn this into a spec and slices.
Create a durable handoff for a fresh thread.
